title: atropis distans var. tenuiflora
intro: Atropis distans var. tenuiflora, also known as the tall bugbane or tenuiflora bugbane, is a plant species within the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Atropis distans var. tenuiflora include its potential to treat various ailments such as colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of conditions.
